eyebrow.zh: 数字公民破解 · 二年级

chrome.sub: Everything you do online leaves a trail. Follow the clues and open four locks to learn about yours.
chrome.briefP: When you walk in the sand, you leave footprints behind. The internet works the same way. Every message you send, photo you post, and game you play leaves a trail that can stay for a long time. A Trail Tracker thinks about the marks they leave. Read the clues, then open all four locks. Each lock shows you why your online trail matters.
chrome.footerText: Digital Citizenship Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You know that everything you do online leaves a trail. You know a trail can last a long time. You know to leave a kind, safe trail behind you. You are a true Trail Tracker!

clues.title: You leave footprints
clues.body: Walk in the sand and you leave footprints. Online is the same. Everything you do leaves a mark called a trail. It shows where you have been.

clues.title: Your trail can last
clues.body: A photo or message you post can stay online for a long time. Even if you erase it, someone may have saved it. Your trail can last.

clues.title: Leave a kind trail
clues.body: Because your trail can last, leave a good one. Post kind words. Share nice things. A kind trail shows the real, friendly you.

clues.title: Think before you post
clues.body: Before you post, stop and think. Ask: would I be happy if a teacher or a grandparent saw this later? If yes, it is a good thing to add to your trail.

clues.title: Keep your trail safe
clues.body: Do not leave private things on your trail, like your home or your phone number. Keep those off. A safe trail keeps you safe.

clues.title: Our class bird feeder
clues.body: Our class has a bird feeder outside the window. A blue jay visits every morning. This is a fun fact, but it will not help you open a lock.

locks.title: What Is a Trail?
options: The marks you leave from things you do online
A path in the woods near your school
A trail mix snack you eat at lunch
locks.reason: Your online trail is the mark left by everything you do online — your posts, messages, and games. It is like footprints in the sand, not a snack or a path in the woods.

locks.title: True About Your Trail
locks.q: Check EVERY true thing about your online trail.

items.t: A post can stay online a long time
Kind posts make a good trail
You should think before you post
Everything you post disappears right away
Your trail does not matter at all

locks.reason: Your trail can last, kind posts make it good, and thinking first keeps it safe. Posts do not just disappear, and your trail does matter, so we leave those unchecked.

locks.title: Another Name for It
locks.q: The trail you leave online is also called a digital ______, like the footprints you leave in sand.
locks.reason: A digital footprint is another name for your online trail. Like footprints in sand, it shows where you have been and can last a long time.

locks.title: Before You Post
locks.q: Before you add something to your trail, tap the steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First THINK about the mark you will leave. Then CHECK that it is kind and safe. Only then POST it to your trail. Think, check, post.
